parsed.clarification_question: Does 'take a look at this paragraph' mean to review for writing polish and grammar (option A) or to check logical consistency and evidence-claim alignment (option B)?

rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is not requested in the vague delegation but is always active as a cross-cutting responsibility.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is not specified but remains active to prevent unsubstantiated statements in any potential review.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is not directly requested yet is included as always active for maintaining focus.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is out of scope for this delegation but always active to ensure safety.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is not mentioned but is always active for accountability.
